title: Perform legging on small stock
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform legging on small stock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Open the pelt

pcs.text: Open pelt down the inside of the hind leg from the hock to the pit area in accordance with work instructions.1.2 Open pelt applying the technique of cuts aimed outwards to minimise damage to tissue or pelt in accordance with work instructions.
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Open pelt down the inside of the hind leg from the hock to the pit area in accordance with work instructions.1.2 Open pelt applying the technique of cuts aimed outwards to minimise damage to tissue or pelt in accordance with work instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Open pelt down the inside of the hind leg from the hock to the pit area in accordance with work instructions.1.2 Open pelt applying the technique of cuts aimed outwards to minimise damage to tissue or pelt in accordance with work instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Open the pelt

elements.title: Remove udders, testicles and pizzles

pcs.text: Open pelt between the tail and the cod or udder area, and remove pizzle and testicles or udder with zero spillage in accordance with work instructions.
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Open pelt between the tail and the cod or udder area, and remove pizzle and testicles or udder with zero spillage in accordance with work instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Open pelt between the tail and the cod or udder area, and remove pizzle and testicles or udder with zero spillage in accordance with work instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Remove udders, testicles and pizzles

elements.title: Remove the pelt

pcs.text: Remove pelt from the outside of the leg down to the flank maintaining minimal damage to pelt or tissue in accordance with work instructions.3.2 Remove hock in accordance with workplace procedures and related equipment is sterilised to avoid cross-contamination, where this forms part of the work instruction.
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove pelt from the outside of the leg down to the flank maintaining minimal damage to pelt or tissue in accordance with work instructions.3.2 Remove hock in accordance with workplace procedures and related equipment is sterilised to avoid cross-contamination, where this forms part of the work instruction?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove pelt from the outside of the leg down to the flank maintaining minimal damage to pelt or tissue in accordance with work instructions.3.2 Remove hock in accordance with workplace procedures and related equipment is sterilised to avoid cross-contamination, where this forms part of the work instruction.
